messages.text: line 3 stopped, panel says BROKEN WEB
the web tension sensor lost the backing web - it either snapped or pulled out of the peel tip. lock out first before you open anything (SOP-1190)
locked out and bled to zero. the backing tore right at the splice from the last roll change
yep, bad splice. re-thread the web through the peel tip and sensor slot per the threading diagram, keep it flat and centered
rethreaded, removed LOTO, ran 30 clean. back up
when you splice, butt the ends, don't overlap - overlap is what tears at the peel tip
